results.original_requirement: The system shall must allow admin to create course with title, description, and category.
The system shall must allow admin to manage course with update and delete operations.
The system shall must allow instructor to upload course content including videos, PDFs, and presentations.
The system shall must allow student to browse courses by category and keyword.
results.atomicity_violations: Multiple actions: allow, browse | Multiple coordinated targets: category, keyword

results.original_requirement: The system shall must allow student to enroll in course after payment or free registration.
The system shall must allow student to access course content after successful enrollment.
The system shall must allow student to track course progress with completion percentage.
The system shall must allow instructor to create quizzes and assignments with deadlines.
results.atomicity_violations: Multiple actions: allow, create | Multiple coordinated targets: quizzes, assignments

results.original_requirement: The system shall must allow student to attempt quizzes within allowed time limit.
The system shall must allow student to submit assignments before deadline with file upload support.
